sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63526" key="lipoqumiw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐποθῡμ-ιώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n63526.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">swoon-like</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archig.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:8:1:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.1.26</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg009:40" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.40</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
